title: The Durgah khawaja Saheb Act, 1955
full_text: The Durgah khawaja Saheb Act, 1955 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195536 Act Number: 36 Enactment Date: 1955-10-14 Act Year: 1955 Short Title: The Durgah khawaja Saheb Act, 1955 Long Title: An Act to make provision for the proper administration of the Durgah and the Endowment of the Durgah of Khawaja Moin-ud-din Chishti, generally known as Durgah Khawaja Saheb, Ajmer. Ministry: Ministry of Minority Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-03-1956 Notification: 1st March, 1956, vide Notification No. S.R.O. 482(E), dated 24th February, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i) TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Durgah khawaja Saheb Act, 1955 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Act to override Act XX of 1863. Section 4. The Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Composition of Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Term of office and resignation and removal of members and casual vacancies. Section 7. President and vice-president. Section 8. Supersession of the Committee. Section 9. Power of Central Government to appoint Nazim. Section 10. Advisory Committee to advise Nazim. Section 11. Powers and duties of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Remuneration of the Sajjadanashin. Section 13. Succession to the office of Sajjadanashin. Section 14. Power to solicit or receive offerings on behalf of the Durgah. Section 15. Committee to observe Muslim Law and tenets of the Chishti Saint. Section 16. Board of Arbitration. Section 17. Defect in the constitution of, or vacancy in, the Committee not to invalidate acts and proceedings. Section 18. Enforcement of final orders of Committee. Section 19. Audit of accounts and annual report. Section 20. Bye-laws. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Transitional provisions. Section 22. Repeal.
